scripts.dev:all: concurrently "pnpm --dir backend dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev" "pnpm --dir worker dev"
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir backend lint && pnpm --dir frontend lint
scripts.test: pnpm --dir backend test && pnpm --dir frontend test
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build && pnpm --dir worker build
scripts.prisma:setup: pnpm --dir backend prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --dir backend prisma db seed
